summary: Completed static analysis for Spanish Vosk model integration. Code implementation is correct but Spanish model is missing from assets directory, causing runtime failures when attempting Spanish speech recognition.

critical_bugs.issue: Spanish model (model-es) is missing from /app/app/src/main/assets/ directory
critical_bugs.impact: Spanish speech recognition will fail with 'Missing Spanish speech model in assets' error
critical_bugs.affected_functionality: Spanish→English translation flow, Spanish listening mode

environment_limitations.issue: No Android SDK/emulator available in container environment
environment_limitations.impact: Cannot perform runtime UI testing or app compilation
environment_limitations.workaround: Comprehensive static code analysis performed instead

passed_tests: ✅ Constants correctly define ENGLISH_MODEL_ASSET_PATH='model-en' and SPANISH_MODEL_ASSET_PATH='model-es'
✅ initVoskModels() correctly calls unpackSpeechModel() for both English and Spanish models
✅ startListening() correctly selects model based on currentListeningLanguage ('es' vs 'en')
✅ Error handling in unpackSpeechModel() shows proper error message for missing Spanish model
✅ areSpeechModelsReady() requires both models to be non-null
✅ Translation flow properly handles Spanish to English translation with TTS in English
✅ Error message strings include 'status_error_speech_model' with language placeholder
✅ Code structure supports dual Vosk models architecture
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Download and place Spanish Vosk model in assets directory. Spanish model must be placed at /app/app/src/main/assets/model-es/ to enable Spanish speech recognition. Recommended model: vosk-model-small-es-0.42 from https://alphacephei.com/vosk/models/
